testcase.name: Telemetry UI Validation - Schema Fix Verification › 01 - Load home page without errors
Telemetry UI Validation - Schema Fix Verification › 02 - Navigate to Avi DM interface
Telemetry UI Validation - Schema Fix Verification › 03 - Compose Avi DM message
Telemetry UI Validation - Schema Fix Verification › 04 - Verify backend logs clean (no schema errors)
Telemetry UI Validation - Schema Fix Verification › 05 - Verify database schema correct
Telemetry UI Validation - Schema Fix Verification › 06 - Check network for 500 errors
Telemetry UI Validation - Schema Fix Verification › 07 - Verify frontend loads without JS errors
Telemetry UI Validation - Schema Fix Verification › 08 - Comprehensive regression check
Telemetry Validation Summary Report › Generate comprehensive validation report
Critical Fixes: WebSocket & Conversation Context › Fix #1: Real-Time Comment Display Without Refresh
Critical Fixes: WebSocket & Conversation Context › Fix #2: Multi-Turn Conversation Context
Critical Fixes: WebSocket & Conversation Context › Combined Test: Real-Time Multi-Turn Conversation
Critical Fixes: WebSocket & Conversation Context › Regression: No Duplicate Avi Responses
